blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 37°F.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 36°F.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 14.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
